languages.text: Стандартные наушники вокс-оператора Астра Милитарум, но чашки их отделанные плотной и странноватой белесой корой, глубоко врезающейся в кожу.
Standard Astra Militarum vox headphones, but the pads are finished with a thick and oddly whitish bark that cuts deeply into the skin.
languages.original_text: Стандартные наушники вокс-оператора Астра Милитарум, но чашки их отделанные плотной и странноватой белесой корой, глубоко врезающейся в кожу.

traits.locale_text: Standard Astra Militarum vox headphones, but the pads are finished with a thick and oddly whitish bark that cuts deeply into the skin.

Standard Astra Militarum vox headphones, but the pads are finished with a thick and oddly whitish bark that cuts deeply into the skin.

languages.text: 標準の軍用ヘッドホンだが、パッドは厚くて奇妙な白っぽい樹皮で覆われており、皮膚を深く切り裂く。
languages.original_text: Standard Astra Militarum vox headphones, but the pads are finished with a thick and oddly whitish bark that cuts deeply into the skin.

traits.locale_text: 標準の軍用ヘッドホンだが、パッドは厚くて奇妙な白っぽい樹皮で覆われており、皮膚を深く切り裂く。

languages.text: 标准的星界军音阵耳机，但耳垫上包着一层厚实而泛白的古怪树皮，勒得皮肤生疼。
languages.original_text: Standard Astra Militarum vox headphones, but the pads are finished with a thick and oddly whitish bark that cuts deeply into the skin.

traits.locale_text: 标准的星界军音阵耳机，但耳垫上包着一层厚实而泛白的古怪树皮，勒得皮肤生疼。

languages.text: Standard-Voxkopfhörer des Astra Militarum, die mit einer dicken und seltsam weißlichen Rinde versehen sind, die tief in die Haut einschneidet.
languages.original_text: Standard Astra Militarum vox headphones, but the pads are finished with a thick and oddly whitish bark that cuts deeply into the skin.

traits.locale_text: Standard-Voxkopfhörer des Astra Militarum, die mit einer dicken und seltsam weißlichen Rinde versehen sind, die tief in die Haut einschneidet.

languages.text: Casque-vox standard de l'Astra Militarum, mais les coussinets sont recouvert d'une écorce épaisse blanchâtre qui s'enfonce dans la peau.
languages.original_text: Standard Astra Militarum vox headphones, but the pads are finished with a thick and oddly whitish bark that cuts deeply into the skin.

traits.locale_text: Casque-vox standard de l'Astra Militarum, mais les coussinets sont recouvert d'une écorce épaisse blanchâtre qui s'enfonce dans la peau.

languages.text: Auriculares de voco estándar del Astra Militarum cuyas almohadillas están cubiertas de una corteza espesa y blanca que se clava en la piel.
languages.original_text: Standard Astra Militarum vox headphones, but the pads are finished with a thick and oddly whitish bark that cuts deeply into the skin.

traits.locale_text: Auriculares de voco estándar del Astra Militarum cuyas almohadillas están cubiertas de una corteza espesa y blanca que se clava en la piel.

languages.text: Standart Astra Militarum voks kulaklıkları, ancak deriyi derince kesen kalın ve tuhaf derecede beyazımsı bir ağaç kabuğu ile kaplanmışlar.
